description.content: Separate account used only by the Locked Account test, so locking it doesn't interfere with the main Register/Login flow above.
Set automatically by Auth > Login - Success

Category write endpoints are ADMIN-only. There is no public way to create an admin yet (that's Day 4's internal-account API) - promote a registered user with `UPDATE users SET role='ADMIN' WHERE email='...'` in MySQL, then run Auth > Login - Success with that account and copy its token here.
Set automatically by Category > Create Category - Admin
Set automatically by Product > Create Category For Products (setup) - kept separate from categoryId so the Category folder's create/delete lifecycle doesn't interfere with Product tests.
Set automatically by Product > Create Product - Admin (Product 1); also used by the Cart folder.
Set automatically by Product > Create Product To Delete (setup)
Set automatically by Cart > Add To Cart - Success
Second customer's JWT, set by Cart > Login - Second Customer (setup); used only for the cross-user access tests.
Set automatically by Auth > Register - Success; used by Admin/Accounts to lock/unlock that same customer.
Set automatically by Order > Create Product For Order Test (setup)
Set automatically by Order > Create Order 1 - Success; carried through the status-transition happy path to COMPLETED.
Set automatically by Order > Create Order 2 - Success; used for the SHIPPING->CANCELLED note-required test.
Set automatically by Order > Create Low-Stock Product (setup); its stock is forced to 0 via PUT to test order-creation rejection.
Set automatically by Admin/Accounts > Login - Staff (setup)

API collection for the Sales Management System backend (com.example.demo). Auth and Category are implemented as of Day 2. Other folders are filled in as their APIs are built (see docs.txt PLANNED SCHEDULE).
